_class.summary: Provides static access to all age assets in the game.
remarks: All properties are resolved directly from the game's asset manager at access time.
A time of promise and optimism where the world feels vibrant and full of possibility. Life flourishes, and societies look toward the future with confidence.

This value is memoized for performance. To clear the memoization cache and force a reload on next access, invoke <see cref="WorldLib.Utils.Tooling.MemoClear{T}()"/> with <see cref="WorldLib.Models.Ages.Age"/> as the generic type argument.
age_hope.value: An <see cref="WorldLib.Models.Ages.Age"/> representing the Hope era.

exceptions.description: If you access this before the age gets initialized.

age_unknown.summary: Represents an unknown or undiscovered age.
remarks: A placeholder era used when the current world age cannot be determined or when the underlying asset is unavailable. When this age is active, it selects a random age.
